# Bombay Breed - India's Strategic Carbon Communications Advisory

> India's only dedicated strategic carbon communications advisory. We help boards, CXOs, and investors navigate climate strategy, carbon markets, and ESG governance with precision advisory that drives board-level results.

Bombay Breed Consulting, led by Theresa Ronnie, is India's only dedicated strategic carbon communications advisory firm. We operate at the intersection of climate strategy, carbon markets, and corporate communications — helping organisations communicate carbon commitments, navigate regulatory complexity, and build the credibility that investors and regulators demand.

Our clients include Fortune 500 companies, Indian conglomerates, public sector enterprises, and growth-stage climate ventures across steel, cement, energy, FMCG, and financial services.

## Pages

- [Homepage](/): Board-level climate advisory and carbon communications for Indian enterprises.
- [About](/about): Founder background, advisory philosophy, and firm credentials.
- [Services](/services): Full advisory catalogue — carbon communications, sustainability reporting, carbon market advisory, ESG communications, and climate strategy.
- [Insights](/insights): Intelligence briefs, reports, and analysis on India's carbon markets and ESG landscape.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Client work across steel, FMCG, power, and diversified conglomerates.
- [Newsletter](/newsletter): The Climate Desk — weekly climate intelligence archive and subscription.
- [Green Jobs Guide](/green-jobs-guide): Interactive guide to India's green economy career landscape.
- [Carbon Market Tracker](/india-carbon-market-tracker): Interactive visualisation of India's carbon pricing trends.
- [Working for the Earth](/working-for-the-earth): Visual narrative on India's green workforce.
- [Renewable Grid Analysis](/india-renewable-grid-analysis): Strategic intelligence brief on India's renewable energy grid.

## Services

- [Carbon Communications Strategy](/carbon-communications-strategy-india): Board and CXO carbon communications, transition plan narratives, and regulatory positioning.
- [Sustainability Reporting](/sustainability-reporting-india): BRSR, GRI, and TCFD compliance into compelling investor-grade narratives.
- [Carbon Market Advisory](/carbon-market-advisory-india): CCTS readiness, voluntary carbon markets, Article 6 mechanisms, and carbon pricing strategy.
- [ESG Communications](/esg-communications-consultant): Stakeholder-specific ESG narratives for investors, regulators, media, and employees.
- [Climate Strategy](/climate-strategy-india-enterprises): Net-zero roadmaps, climate risk assessment, energy transition planning, and regulatory navigation.
- [Energy Optimisation Consulting](/energy-optimisation-consulting): Industrial energy efficiency and cost reduction strategy.
- [Industrial Decarbonisation Strategy](/industrial-decarbonisation-strategy): Sector-specific decarbonisation roadmaps and communications.
- [Article 6 Advisory](/article-6-advisory): International carbon market cooperation and ITMO strategy.
- [Climate Investment Readiness](/climate-investment-readiness): Green bonds, sustainability-linked finance, and investor positioning.
- [DMRV & Integrity Due Diligence](/dmrv-integrity-due-diligence): Digital monitoring, reporting, verification, and carbon credit integrity assessment.
- [BRSR Reporting Advisory](/brsr-reporting-advisory-india): SEBI BRSR compliance and sustainability disclosure strategy.
- [Carbon Credit Trading Scheme](/carbon-credit-trading-scheme-india): India's CCTS compliance and domestic carbon market advisory.

## Insights & Reports

- [India Renewable Grid Analysis](/india-renewable-grid-analysis): Strategic intelligence on India's energy transition and grid dynamics.
- [Carbon Playbook](/insights/carbon-playbook): Practical guide to corporate carbon strategy in India.
- [Energy Transition Playbook](/insights/energy-transition-playbook): Board-level energy transition planning and communications.
- [Carbon Market Outlook](/insights/carbon-market-outlook): India's carbon market trends and pricing analysis.
- [Compliance to Credibility](/insights/compliance-to-credibility): Moving beyond checkbox ESG to stakeholder trust.
- [WEF Global Risks 2026](/insights/wef-global-risks-2026): Climate risk analysis for Indian enterprises.
- [Green Jobs India 2026](/insights/green-jobs-india-2026): India's green economy workforce landscape.
- [Narrative Hiring Gap](/insights/narrative-hiring-gap): Sustainability talent and communications gap analysis.

## Industry Coverage

- [Steel Industry](/steel-industry): Decarbonisation, CBAM compliance, and carbon market strategy.
- [Cement Industry](/cement-industry): Low-carbon strategies and CBAM readiness.
- [Oil & Gas](/oil-gas): Energy transition and diversification advisory.
- [Power & Utilities](/power-utilities): Grid decarbonisation and renewable integration.
- [Data Centres](/data-centres): Energy efficiency and green power procurement.

## Regulatory Expertise

- [CCTS - Carbon Credit Trading Scheme](/ccts): India's domestic compliance carbon market.
- [CBAM](/cbam): EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism for Indian exporters.
- [BRSR](/brsr-compliance): SEBI Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting.
- [Article 6](/article-6): Paris Agreement international carbon market cooperation.
- [PAT Scheme](/pat-scheme): India's energy efficiency trading scheme.
- [Corresponding Adjustments](/corresponding-adjustments): NDC integrity and international transfer accounting.

## Geographic Coverage

- [India](/india): National climate policy, CCTS, BRSR, and renewable energy.
- [Gujarat](/gujarat): Industrial decarbonisation and petrochemical clusters.
- [Maharashtra](/maharashtra): Manufacturing, steel, cement, and power sector.
- [UAE](/uae): GCC energy transition, Article 6, and regional carbon markets.
- [Singapore](/singapore): Climate finance hub and regional sustainability leadership.
